testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message:
class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

testcase.failure:
io.cucumber.core.exception.CucumberException: class stepDefinitions.Hooks does not have a public zero-argument constructor.
To use dependency injection add an other ObjectFactory implementation such as: * cucumber-picocontainer * cucumber-spring * cucumber-jakarta-cdi * ...etc

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Username']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Username']' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@placeholder='Username']"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) For documentation on this error, please visit:
